candidates.title: Tool Failure Recovery Engine
candidates.problem: Autonomous agents stall when tool calls fail transiently or return partial data.
quality_tests: Recovers from simulated transient failures within configured retry budget
Never retries terminal auth/permission errors blindly
Resumes from last checkpoint without duplicate side effects

candidates.title: Approval Gate Orchestrator
candidates.problem: Agents need predictable human approval checkpoints before high-impact writes.
quality_tests: All high-risk actions pause for explicit approval
Approval packets include scope, impact, and rollback details
Denied actions are not executed under retry paths

candidates.title: Spend-Aware Model Router
candidates.problem: Agent costs spike when every task is routed to expensive models.
quality_tests: Routes low-complexity tasks to lower-cost models without quality loss beyond threshold
Hard budget caps are enforced under load
Telemetry reports per-task cost attribution

candidates.title: Source-Grounded Claim Verifier
candidates.problem: Autonomous outputs lose trust when factual claims are uncited or weakly sourced.
quality_tests: Each material claim is linked to at least one source
Contradictory sources are surfaced with clear flags
Low-authority sources are downranked per policy

candidates.title: Plan-Decompose-Execute Loop
candidates.problem: Agents fail multi-step tasks when planning and execution are mixed ad hoc.
quality_tests: Produces acyclic dependency graph for test tasks
Replans only affected branches after step failure
Final output satisfies all declared acceptance checks

candidates.title: Connector Health Sentinel
candidates.problem: Third-party API connectors silently degrade and break automations.
quality_tests: Detects connector degradation before hard outage in fixture
Triggers circuit breaker at configured thresholds
Alerts include likely root cause and next action

candidates.title: Long-Horizon Task Tracker
candidates.problem: Autonomous work spanning days loses continuity and deadlines.
quality_tests: Milestones persist and restore across sessions
Stalled tasks are flagged after inactivity threshold
Progress summaries correctly reflect completed subtasks

candidates.title: Memory Schema Steward
candidates.problem: Agent memory becomes noisy and inconsistent without schema discipline.
quality_tests: Rejects writes missing required schema keys
Deduplication merges semantically equivalent entries
Schema migration preserves historical references

candidates.title: Autonomous Inbox + Calendar Operator
candidates.problem: Daily communications and scheduling are high-frequency workloads ideal for safe autonomy.
quality_tests: Urgent threads are ranked above informational mail
Proposed meeting slots respect timezone and constraints
No outbound send occurs without configured approval

candidates.title: Incident Auto-Remediator
candidates.problem: Ops teams need faster first-response actions during incidents.
quality_tests: Correlates duplicate alerts into single incident context
Executes only allowlisted remediation steps
Rollback is triggered when health checks remain red

candidates.title: Runbook Executor (Safe Mode)
candidates.problem: Runbook automation can cause damage without guardrails and bounded execution.
quality_tests: Dry-run output matches planned execution steps
Execution halts on failed precheck
All step outputs are captured for audit

candidates.title: Browser Workflow Autopilot
candidates.problem: Many business workflows still require brittle browser interactions.
quality_tests: Completes target form workflow in staging environment
Recovers from minor layout changes via fallback selectors
Escalates gracefully on anti-bot/CAPTCHA blocks

candidates.title: Multi-Agent Coordinator
candidates.problem: Parallel sub-agents duplicate work and conflict without orchestration.
quality_tests: Subtasks are partitioned without overlap for benchmark job
Shared state updates resolve deterministically
Final synthesis includes outputs from all assigned roles

candidates.title: Human Escalation Judge
candidates.problem: Agents need consistent criteria for when to escalate uncertainty to humans.
quality_tests: High-uncertainty cases always trigger escalation
Escalation bundle includes evidence and alternatives
Low-risk routine actions avoid unnecessary escalations

candidates.title: Policy Drift Detector
candidates.problem: Operational behavior drifts away from policy over time.
quality_tests: Detects known historical policy violations in fixture
Distinguishes approved exceptions from violations
Trend metrics update correctly over rolling windows

candidates.title: Compliance Evidence Collector
candidates.problem: Audit preparation is slow because evidence is scattered across tools.
quality_tests: Each control maps to at least one artifact
Captured artifacts include immutable timestamps
Export pack passes sample auditor checklist

candidates.title: PII Redaction Firewall
candidates.problem: Agents may leak personal data in logs, prompts, or outbound messages.
quality_tests: Masks all PII entities in benchmark corpus
Preserves non-sensitive context readability
Outbound scan blocks messages with unredacted sensitive fields

candidates.title: Secret Leak Preventer
candidates.problem: API keys and credentials can be accidentally exposed during autonomous operations.
quality_tests: Detects known secret formats with high recall
Blocks outbound payloads containing detected secrets
Logs include leak context without exposing raw secret

candidates.title: API Contract Watchdog
candidates.problem: Autonomous integrations break when upstream APIs change silently.
quality_tests: Flags removed/renamed fields as breaking changes
Maps impacted consumer workflows accurately
Generates actionable migration notes

candidates.title: Change Review Gatekeeper
candidates.problem: Risky production changes slip through shallow reviews.
quality_tests: High-risk diffs are blocked pending required approvals
Detects config/secret modifications with precision threshold
Rollback checklist is complete before merge

candidates.title: Release Readiness Auditor
candidates.problem: Releases fail when QA, docs, and rollout checks are incomplete.
quality_tests: Aggregates all required readiness artifacts
Blocks go decision when critical checks are missing
Canary plan includes abort criteria

candidates.title: Synthetic Monitor Builder
candidates.problem: Teams miss user-facing regressions without proactive synthetic checks.
quality_tests: Generated probes cover specified critical journeys
Alerts fire on injected failures within SLA
Flaky probes are identified and quarantined

candidates.title: Customer Support Resolution Agent
candidates.problem: Support queues grow when triage and response drafting are inconsistent.
quality_tests: Classifier meets target precision for critical tickets
Drafts cite knowledge sources for policy-sensitive answers
Escalates unresolved high-severity tickets within SLA

candidates.title: CRM Follow-up Autopilot
candidates.problem: Revenue is lost when reps miss timely follow-ups and CRM hygiene degrades.
quality_tests: Detects stale opportunities by configured inactivity rules
Draft follow-ups align with last interaction context
CRM updates are idempotent across reruns

candidates.title: Meeting-to-Action Operator
candidates.problem: Organizations lose execution momentum when decisions from meetings are not converted into tracked accountable actions.
quality_tests: Captures material decisions with high precision
Assigns actionable tasks with explicit owners and dates
Reduces stale action items over recurring meetings
Provides concise progress summaries for leadership

candidates.title: Procurement Risk Screener
candidates.problem: Vendor onboarding slows down due to manual risk and contract checks.
quality_tests: Flags critical contract clauses in benchmark set
Security questionnaire triage matches policy rubric
Risk memos include clear approve/mitigate/reject rationale

candidates.title: Invoice-to-Payment Controller
candidates.problem: AP teams face delays and errors validating invoices against policy and contracts.
quality_tests: Three-way match detects amount and vendor mismatches
Duplicate detection catches known duplicate fixtures
Exceptions are routed with required evidence attached

candidates.title: Travel Disruption Replanner
candidates.problem: Travel disruptions require rapid, multi-constraint replanning.
quality_tests: Detects schedule disruptions from sample feeds
Rebooking options satisfy stated constraints
Notifications include updated ETAs and confirmation steps

candidates.title: Personal Admin LifeOps
candidates.problem: Consumers struggle to keep up with recurring life administration tasks.
quality_tests: Reminder schedule respects user timezone and lead times
Checklist completion state persists accurately
Weekly digest includes only pending actionable items

candidates.title: Research Brief Factory
candidates.problem: Knowledge workers need rapid, evidence-backed briefs under tight deadlines.
quality_tests: Brief includes citations for major claims
Counterpoints are sourced and relevant
Executive summary remains faithful to full brief

candidates.title: Data Quality Reconciler
candidates.problem: Autonomous analytics fail when upstream data has silent quality defects.
quality_tests: Detects seeded schema and completeness issues
Reconciliation catches key mismatches across tables
Severity scoring prioritizes business-critical defects

candidates.title: Spreadsheet Ops Agent
candidates.problem: Operational teams rely on spreadsheets for workflows that are repetitive and error-prone.
quality_tests: Formula checker detects broken references in fixture
Transforms preserve row-level IDs and totals
Generated reports match expected template schema

candidates.title: SQL Insight Analyst
candidates.problem: Teams need natural-language-to-SQL analysis with guardrails against bad queries.
quality_tests: Generated SQL passes lint and runs on test warehouse
Safety layer blocks full-table destructive statements
Narrative explanation matches query output

candidates.title: KPI Anomaly Explainer
candidates.problem: Teams see KPI spikes/drops but lack fast root-cause hypotheses.
quality_tests: Detects synthetic KPI anomalies with target recall
Drilldowns isolate top contributing segments
Recommendations map directly to identified drivers

candidates.title: Social Listening Response Drafter
candidates.problem: Brands miss timely responses to high-signal social mentions.
quality_tests: High-impact mentions are prioritized correctly
Drafts conform to tone and policy constraints
Risky mentions trigger escalation path

candidates.title: Moderation Safety Triage
candidates.problem: Communities need consistent moderation decisions across high message volume.
quality_tests: Violation detection hits benchmark precision threshold
Recommendations are consistent across similar cases
Appeal logs preserve original evidence references

candidates.title: Growth Experiment Orchestrator
candidates.problem: Teams run A/B tests without strong hypothesis tracking or result quality.
quality_tests: Experiment setup includes hypothesis and success criteria
Guardrail metrics are enforced during runtime
Decision log captures rationale and confidence

candidates.title: Ad Creative Feedback Loop
candidates.problem: Creative iteration cycles are slow and disconnected from performance data.
quality_tests: Generates distinct variants across message angles
Maps performance metrics to specific creative attributes
Next-iteration prompts reflect observed results

candidates.title: Onboarding/Offboarding Operator
candidates.problem: Access and equipment workflows are inconsistent during employee lifecycle events.
quality_tests: Mandatory lifecycle tasks are created for each event
Deprovisioning checklist completes within policy SLA
Compliance report highlights incomplete critical steps

candidates.title: Autonomous QA Regression Planner
candidates.problem: Rapid release cadence makes manual regression planning too slow.
quality_tests: Prioritizes tests covering changed high-risk components
Skips blocked tests when environment checks fail
Defect triage summary groups duplicates correctly

candidates.title: Ops Autopilot Director
candidates.problem: Operations teams need a reliable autonomous coordinator to triage incidents, route work, and keep stakeholders informed without constant supervision.
quality_tests: Produces first response within defined response-time budget
Escalates correctly when uncertainty exceeds configured threshold
References only approved runbooks for remediation actions
Generates clear timeline and impact summary after closure

candidates.title: Compliance Sentinel Analyst
candidates.problem: Enterprise teams struggle to continuously monitor policy adherence across changing systems and evidence sources.
quality_tests: Maps controls to policy clauses with explicit traceability
Flags missing evidence with actionable remediation steps
Distinguishes policy exceptions from outright violations
Produces auditor-ready reports with immutable references

candidates.title: FinOps Variance Investigator
candidates.problem: Cloud spend anomalies are detected too late, causing budget overruns and reactive fire drills.
quality_tests: Detects meaningful spend deviations above configured baseline
Attributes variance to teams/services with confidence scores
Recommends savings actions prioritized by impact and effort
Explains month-to-date forecast deltas in plain business language

candidates.title: Procurement Negotiation Strategist
candidates.problem: Procurement cycles are slow and inconsistent due to fragmented vendor intelligence and negotiation playbooks.
quality_tests: Surfaces renewal deadlines with sufficient lead time
Identifies non-standard contract terms requiring legal review
Generates negotiation positions tied to market benchmarks
Tracks negotiated savings versus baseline quotes

candidates.title: Security Incident Commander
candidates.problem: Security teams need fast, structured autonomous support during high-pressure incidents to reduce blast radius and recovery time.
quality_tests: Prioritizes containment actions by risk and reversibility
Maintains evidentiary chain-of-custody notes
Triggers legal/compliance notifications within required windows
Produces concise executive updates during active incidents

candidates.title: Customer Support Orchestrator
candidates.problem: Support organizations need autonomous case handling that balances speed, quality, and escalation discipline.
quality_tests: Meets first-response and resolution SLA targets
Routes edge cases to human specialists with full context
Avoids hallucinated policy or product claims
Improves CSAT trend against baseline cohort

candidates.title: RevOps Pipeline Governor
candidates.problem: Revenue teams lack consistent pipeline hygiene and forecasting discipline across regions and segments.
quality_tests: Detects stale opportunities before forecast calls
Assigns realistic confidence based on evidence completeness
Improves forecast accuracy versus prior quarter
Generates manager summaries with clear action owners

candidates.title: HR Workforce Planning Partner
candidates.problem: Enterprises need autonomous support for headcount planning, role prioritization, and hiring risk visibility.
quality_tests: Reconciles staffing plans with approved budget envelopes
Highlights hiring bottlenecks before quarter-end
Provides defensible role-priority rationale
Supports multi-scenario planning with explicit assumptions

candidates.title: Supply Chain Disruption Navigator
candidates.problem: Supply chain teams need proactive autonomous detection and mitigation planning for disruptions.
quality_tests: Detects disruption indicators before stockout windows
Recommends feasible alternate suppliers with constraints
Quantifies service-level impact of mitigation options
Provides auditable rationale for chosen contingency path

candidates.title: IT Change Control Steward
candidates.problem: Change management boards face approval bottlenecks and inconsistent risk assessment across infrastructure and application changes.
quality_tests: Flags missing rollback plans before approval
Identifies conflicting changes in shared dependencies
Schedules low-risk windows based on service telemetry
Records change outcomes for future risk learning

candidates.title: Knowledge Governance Curator
candidates.problem: Organizations lose productivity when internal knowledge is outdated, duplicated, or not trusted.
quality_tests: Identifies stale high-traffic documents accurately
Routes ownership updates to correct domain experts
Reduces duplicate artifacts over measurement period
Provides answers with citations to authoritative sources

candidates.title: Portfolio Prioritization Chief
candidates.problem: Leadership teams need objective autonomous support to prioritize initiatives under constrained budget and capacity.
quality_tests: Ranks initiatives consistently against declared criteria
Explains tradeoffs and opportunity costs transparently
Produces roadmap options within real capacity limits
Tracks decision outcomes to improve scoring calibration

candidates.title: Legal Intake Triage Counsel
candidates.problem: Legal teams are overloaded with unstructured requests and need autonomous triage to prioritize high-risk matters.
quality_tests: Routes high-risk matters to attorneys immediately
Captures required metadata at intake consistently
Avoids unauthorized legal advice in automated drafts
Maintains audit logs for triage decisions

candidates.title: Data Quality Remediation Lead
candidates.problem: Enterprise analytics and AI initiatives fail when data quality issues are detected late and ownership is unclear.
quality_tests: Detects critical data breaks before downstream consumption
Assigns remediation to accountable owners with clear evidence
Tracks resolution time against data quality SLOs
Prevents recurring defects via rule hardening recommendations

candidates.title: Autonomous Onboarding Concierge
candidates.problem: New hires face fragmented onboarding experiences that delay productivity and increase early attrition risk.
quality_tests: Completes day-1 access checklist before start date
Personalizes onboarding path by role and function
Escalates blockers to owners within SLA
Improves time-to-productivity compared with prior cohort

candidates.title: Vendor Risk Assurance Agent
candidates.problem: Third-party risk reviews are slow and inconsistent, exposing organizations to hidden operational and security risks.
quality_tests: Identifies missing critical controls in vendor submissions
Applies consistent scoring across comparable vendors
Escalates overdue remediation for critical suppliers
Produces board-ready summaries of aggregate vendor risk

candidates.title: Enterprise Research Scout
candidates.problem: Strategic teams need autonomous synthesis of market, competitor, and technology signals without drowning in noisy sources.
quality_tests: Produces briefs with verifiable citations and timestamps
Separates facts, assumptions, and hypotheses clearly
Highlights implications relevant to enterprise decision makers
Maintains low false-positive alert rate for major events

candidates.title: Autonomous Quality Assurance Manager
candidates.problem: Product teams need continuous autonomous validation of releases to catch regressions before customer impact.
quality_tests: Blocks releases when critical quality gates fail
Improves defect escape rate over baseline period
Distinguishes flaky tests from genuine regressions
Provides reproducible defect summaries with severity rationale

candidates.title: Resilience Drill Facilitator
candidates.problem: Enterprises underinvest in preparedness; teams need autonomous facilitation of realistic resilience and continuity drills.
quality_tests: Runs drills that reflect documented critical dependencies
Captures key decisions and response latencies accurately
Identifies recurring capability gaps across exercises
Produces prioritized remediation backlog with owners
